entry.title: Re: Space between page header and table header on multipl...
entry.content: I read all the solutions but none of them worked for me.  In my case, I simply had a table that followed the page header and on page 2 and afterward it was butting up as described.  My solution was to insert another row in the table just above the existing table header.  I sized the height to .05 and removed any relative vertical positioning.  I then made sure that there were no undesired borders in all that rows cells.  This works beautifully, is easy, and is a primary solution to providing spacing between the header and subsequent tables or as an alternative to relative spacing.

entry.title: Re: How can we open IQ 16.1 under SUSE 15 with O_DIRECT f...
entry.content: Does it cover IQ MPX 16.1 under SUSE 15 SP5 and FileSystem DBfiles ?

entry.title: Conversion Routine in AMDP for MATERIAL (MATNR)

How can we use 'CONVERSION_EXIT_MATN1_INPUT'  in AMDP, where we need to convert Material No, into internal formant ? we have to avoid loop

entry.title: Re: While creating outbound delivery I am getting an error " Component not active" Message
entry.content:
Dear Fqazi, could you please provide further information regarding how you created this outbound delivery until the error message you received? Would be better to send us the steps to reproduce the issue to further check this situation inside your system opening a case for SAP Support. But if you prefer can send it by there, and we can take a quick look if it's not confidential information.

 

Many Thanks!

 

Best regards,

Geovana

entry.title: Re: SAP CDC | PhoneNumber as login identifier
entry.content:
Hello @Rvanjari,

The  SAP CDC platform's design prevents duplicate phone numbers for contacts to ensure data integrity and security, especially for operations like OTP and verification.

You can alternatively, use the EMAIL as UID and also store multiple phone numbers under the PHONE field.
Once you enabled Phone no. as an identifier, you wouldn't and shouldn't do as you wish.

I hope this answers your query.

Best Regards,
Kunal Bansal | SAP CX Solution Architect

https://www.linkedin.com/in/thekunalbansal

entry.title: Errors during insert in Z* table from tab delimited file
entry.content: Hi Experts,

You can check your settings. You will definitely resolved this issue.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi David,

I am an EDI specialist with 15 years experience working with EDI interfaces within supply chain management environments. I fall under the following categories: 1. Women and 2. People looking to switch their careers mid-life

I hope to become an SD and EDI Functional Analyst.  Thank you for this opportunity to achieve certification. The Digital Skills Initiative is an amazing idea!  Kudos! 

Regards,

Veronica

entry.title: Re: Help for splitter and subscreen
entry.content:
Demo program DEMO_DYNPRO_SPLITTER_CONTROL.

  1. Create a special element of type splitter in your screen, any name, SASH 50% for instance anyway you'll set it by program, choose "vertical", give names for the splitter and the two subscreen areas (top and bottom). If I remember well, use CALL SUBSCREEN to include the subscreens you want in the top and bottom subscreen areas.
  2. Before the CALL SCREEN or during PBO, create the instance of CL_DYNPRO_SPLITTER with the name of the element. Possibly, call SET_SASH method to set the SASH % (use 50 the first time), assign 
  3. In the PAI, call GET_SASH method to get the SASH %, you will use it for the next SET_SASH in the PBO.

entry.title: Re: Where can I find free material to study SAP SuccessFa...
entry.content:
Hi @MahaSF 
I recommend to access our free Configuring SAP SuccessFactors Compensation learning journey t build the skills you need at your own pace.

Overview
This learning journey will guide you through the configurations necessary to implement SAP SuccessFactors Compensation.

Learning objectives
After completing this learning journey, consultants will be able to perform and configure the core functionalities within SAP SuccessFactors Compensation and access the resources and support available to configure additional features.


Prerequisites
  • Exploring the SAP SuccessFactors Platform

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Error when executing the Sync SAP Information to Arib...
entry.content:
Hello, 

As the Managed Gateway for Spend&Network programs create the Logical port definition for their proxy objects automatically, there is no need to manually create them.
Delete the logical port definition via SOAMANAGER and execute the Interface Setup or Synchronization program again.

If the issue persists after deleting the logical port definition, check if the table ARBCIG_CIG_URL from client 000 is consistent with the table with the current client you're executing the program. If not, perform the client copy from client 000, described in the Managed Gateway for Spend&Network installation guide.

How to copy content from client 000

entry.title: SAC for office excel stuck on login screen
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are trying to access SAC Excel add-in and its loading & loading when we click on login and ended without logging in. PFA for more info about the issue and version details.

This issue is only affecting a few users. These affected users have the latest MS Excel installed and they have used the Add-in for several months until yesterday afternoon when the issue began.

Most of the other users can login in seconds.

Please let us know if there is any resolution recommendations. We have tried removing excel add-in and add it again.

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Re: SAP Ariba cycle time
entry.content:
Hi,

 That is a system design, so no way to currently change it. You could submit an enhancement request, however.

entry.title: How to use Reference material for Automatic packing, What are the config steps and Master data setup
entry.content:
Hi Experts

 My client want to use the reference material functionality for automatic packing. Appreciate, if you can provide the inputs on the config and master data setup.

entry.title: Variable Pay - Calculation to exclude LOA period for given condition
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We got a requirement as below and looking for any suggestions or solutions on this.

We have employees taking leave across years and they are not eligible for Bonus. But, from this year, for those employees, we want to give a benefit of first 30 day bonus and in the consecutive years, no bonus should get calculated.

For ex: if an employee goes on leave on Nov 1 2023 and returns May 30 2024. This year, 2024, we should not pay him any bonus as that employee was paid bonus for 30 days in 2023.

Am checking if any of the customers have this type of requirement and handled it. If so, let me know the solution or suggest any solution.

Thank you.

Regards,
Balaji

entry.title: ABAPer (HANA) need direction on BTP vs GenAI
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am an SAP ABAP HANA Consultant with more than 15 yrs exp.  I have worked in FIORI based development.  As I am reaching 'old timer' status, what should be way forward.  Should I focus on SAP BTP or GENAI.  Also I have interest in SAP PP/DS and PM.

If it is GENAI, what is the role should I look for.  In india its tough to work as a developer after this much years.

Need your valuable suggestions.

Regards

Sunil

entry.title: Re: Emarsys Open data
entry.content:
Hello @iammilos,
Based on my experience, I can confirm that there are no restrictions on using the Emarsys Open Data only for EU or specific regions.

You can get in touch with your SAP Success Manager and they will support you or submit a SAP ticket.

ℹ️Info for others: Open Data is a Google Cloud Platform plug-in that enables you to query and export all the email, web, sms and mobile app behaviour and response data that you have stored in your Emarsys account. 

I hope this answers your query.

Best Regards,
Kunal Bansal | SAP CX Solution Architect
https://www.linkedin.com/in/thekunalbansal

entry.title: Re: PO blocked in S4 cancels PO in Ariba network.
entry.content: Hi, this is the expected behavior so both systems synch upon deletion indicators and to make sure the right status reflects in both your ERP and the Business Network. Perhaps your CSP can help you get more help through consulting, however!

entry.title: Successfactor Monthly Time Sheet can't be enabled in Time Recording Approval Period

entry.title: Re: Ariba Suite -Ariba Network-Ariba CIG

SAP managed gateway (formerly known as Ariba CIG) can maintain integrations with other SAP apps, the Business Network, and ERP systems. 

Where can I find Managed Gateway for Spend&Network-related guides? has some good general information attached that can help you learn more!

entry.title: Re: Subtotal not being displayed in the fiori app created...
entry.content: Found the answer for this one, we have to change the table type and table settings to use AnalyticalTable instead of ResponsiveTable.

entry.title: Re: OData Services Functionality in SAP Cloud Version 2
entry.content:
Hello @wwojtas,

In SAP C4Cv2, predefined REST APIs are available but may not cover all objects like Accounts. To integrate external 3rd party and synchronize such objects, you can explore the following options:

  • Use SAP Cloud Application Studio to create custom APIs, exposing necessary endpoints for objects not included in the predefined REST APIs.
  • Use CPI to build custom integration flows, connecting V2 with third-party systems.

I hope this answers your query.

Best Regards,
Kunal Bansal | SAP CX Solution Architect
https://www.linkedin.com/in/thekunalbansal

entry.title: Re: SAP Ariba Integration - APIs with Filter
entry.content:
@GeorgeAbraham I'm having the same difficulty with the Document Approval API. Does anyone have any solution?
#SAP Ariba Buying and Invoicing

entry.title: Re: Issue related to User ID mapping from EC to ECC
entry.content:
Hi @PMurali,

For this scenario you can explore the "Use of Assignment ID in Employee Central Integration with SAP S∕4HANA".

If you enable use of assignment ID in Employee Central, it’s transferred to the SAP S∕4HANA system and used there as the personnel number when new hires are replicated. This means you can have a User ID M10001765 with and replicated the assignment ID 62763465.

Hope this helps.

entry.title: Re: Emarsys Open data
entry.content:
Hi @Kunal_Bansal ,

Thanx for message. 

I am asking because of this part : "Open Data datasets can only be stored in the EU and can only be accessed by Google tools if their region is set to the EU as well. It is not possible to process and access EU data with a tool set up in a different region." from docs .

If customers pick region EU and sent data FROM EU but engagement is made in USA, what is happening with USA data? Will it be visible in Open Data? 

Thank you very much, and I will contact SAP person if customer decide they will use add-on in future.

BR,

Milos

entry.title: Re: Develop 3rd party application to connect SAP ariba ac...
entry.content:
Hello,

Designated Support Contact (DSC) is a contact in the Buying org. Suppliers don't have DSCs. From the supplier side, Configuring an SAP Business Network Account for cXML Routing provides steps and info!

entry.title: Re: Webhook is not triggering for account data update
entry.content:
Hello @grohitg238,

I recommend below approach to handle this - 

  • Add a brief delay or a different field update between setting the flag to true and then false to ensure changes are taken.

  •  

    Split the dataflow into 2 steps to ensure the system processes each state change distinctly.

The steps would be - 

  1. Fetch the user details from SAP CDC.
  2. Update the custom flag to true.
  3. Introduce a minor, unrelated update or introduce a short delay to ensure the state change is recognized.
  4. Update the custom flag to false.

 

I hope this answers your query.

Best Regards,
Kunal Bansal | SAP CX Solution Architect
https://www.linkedin.com/in/thekunalbansal

entry.title: Re: Errors during insert in Z* table from tab delimited file

(and delete your "blog post")

entry.title: Re: Sap Ariba APIs and Web Services
entry.content: Hi, APIs allow you to do a plethora of things depending on your business needs and the available APIs. Here is a list of all the actions you could perform; https://help.sap.com/doc/631084d43b6a4216b391ec37ce94733b/cloud/en-US/ws_index.htm

entry.title: Re: Presentation Mode: Integration of Core Digital Boardroom Features in the Optimized Experience
entry.content:
@subashm_sap the Navigational Panel is exclusive to Present Mode and is not available in View Mode or Embed Mode. 

  • In case this is something that is desired, please submit an influence portal request.
  • In case this is something that you see exposed in Embed Mode, please follow the process and report a ticket for SAP Development to look at the issue

For Present Mode itself, as mentioned in the Blog Post, we provide flexibility in terms of deciding whether the Navigational Panel should be expanded or collapsed. We will also remove access to the Navigational Panel as soon as the Designers removes the icon from the View Time Toolbar configuration options.

entry.title: Re: Presentation Mode: Integration of Core Digital Boardroom Features in the Optimized Experience
entry.content: @attila_kiss please follow the process and report a ticket for SAP Development to look at the issue in case the issue is persisting.

entry.title: Re: Ariba: Address details not replicating
entry.content:
Hello,

You can add a Contract element in the order cXML sent from your ERP to include the Ordering Address on the PO. See Why is the Ordering Address not being displayed in SAP Business Network for a PO?

entry.title: Re: New Enhancement related to GST trial balance (Multipl...
entry.content:
Hi Sanil,

Thank you for the quick reply, I have checked the link my queries are:

1) Is there any T.code where we can mention the  GSTIN registration no. in SAP or we have only Business place information which we consider as the GSTIN field? Our client needs the GST trial balance info as per the multiple GSTIN no. (i.e they have two different GSTIN no.).

2) I know that GST Trial balance is possible as per the business area wise but how we can customize the report as per the two different GSTIN no?

3) I know there is a table for G/L to tax code assignment which is T030K, but i want to know that is there any table to find out the assignment of tax code to GSTIN no.?

Thanks & Regards,

Kingsu Sharma

entry.title: Dynamic footer Number in custom variable pay statement
entry.content:
Hi Everyone, 

I have a requirement regarding the custom statement in variable pay. 

We need to publish the name of goal name assignment wise. Suppose there are 3 assignments named "Assignment1" , "LOA", "TLA" . Assignment1 has one goal called "Operations" , LOA has one goal called "LOA" and TLA has one goal called "TLA" . So for a particular period LOA and TLA can get assigned more than once.

The requirement is to assign a superscript to LOA and TLA which ever comes first in assignment . ex- 

from 1st Oct to 31st Oct - Assignment1

from 1st nov to 15th Nov- LOA

from 16th Nov to 30th Nov- TLA

from 1st Dec to 10th Dec- LOA

and so on....

So out of LOA and TLA whichever comes first in terms of date that will be printed as mentioned below .(If LOA comes earlier than TLA then

LOA4

TLA5

if TLA comes before LOA then it will be printed as 

TLA4

LOA5

Any suggestion here is highly appreciated. 

 

Thanks and Regards, 

Prashant 

SAP SuccessFactors Compensation

entry.title: Re: Dynamic field labels sap rap

Since there are master data objects being uploaded using CIG to parent & child realm ( material master, company code, GL, cost center, etc...)  - Does Spend Analysis need separate master data uploads or can use or replicate these objects?

entry.title: CSRF token issue with Rest API type of system integration in SAP build apps
entry.content:
Hello,

We have created a backend destination in subaccount and tried creating a 'SAP BTP Destination REST API integration' type data entity.

We select the BTP destination created in subaccount and configure the list(GET call) to the required entity. we are adding additional inputs for filters.

and passing filter value dynamically from JS file as below in get record collection.(formula : "?$filter="+outputs["JSFile"].result)

This is working perfectly fine in local app preview from build apps. But when i deploy the app to launchpad and expose the app as tile and open it through launchpad i get CSRF token error as below.

Are we missing any configuration? Please help us with any idea/ suggestions.

Thank you,

Navya

entry.title: Errors during insert in Z* table from tab delimited file
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
I have a bigtab delimited file (*.txt) with some 30 fields separated by tabs in a record.
These fields are spilling over to next row.

Issue 1 ) When i am reading this file using GUI_UPLOAD, its only taking 26 fields & ignoring other 4 fields.
I delared my itab like this:

types: begin of ty_filedata,
lv_data type string,
end of ty_filedata.

data: gt_filedata type standard table of ty_filedata.

I tried declaring lv_data with 3000 chars like below also:
lv_data(3000) type c.

Issue 2): I am looping at above gt_filedata & splitting at tabs'(using cl_abap_char_utilities=>horizontal_tab)
but i cannot see that all fields are getting updated into gt_data.

loop at gt_filedata into data(ls_filedata).
split ls_filedata-lv_data at cl_abap_char_utilities=>horizontal_tab into wa_data-field1 wa_data-field2
....... .....
..... ........
wa_data-field30.
append wa_data to gt_data.
endloop.

entry.title: Re: How to Retrieve Key Performance Metrics from SAP ASE...
entry.content:
Referring to the latest set of questions:

1. If by instance id you're referring to the separate nodes (aka instances) within a cluster setup then you'll want to look at running sp_monitorconfig against each node (instance) of the cluster.

The word 'instance' is synonymous with 'dataserver' and typically refers to unique, separate invocations of the dataserver software.  If you have separate dataservers HR_dev, HR_test, HR_prod, Finance_prod then these would be referred to as four dataservers or instances.

In a cluster setup 'instance' still refers to separate 'dataservers' but they are configured to work as a single unit; in this case InstanceID (common column in MDA tables that capture cluster metrics) in an internal id used by the cluster software to reference the individual dataservers that make up the cluster.

2. If you were to run sp_configure memory you should see the following at the end of the output:

An additional 32130 K bytes of memory is available for reconfiguration. This is the difference between 'max memory' and 'total logical memory'.

This tells us this ASE instance (aka dataserver) has 32,130 KB of memory that has been allocated at the OS level but has not yet been allocated for a specific use within the dataserver.

The key item of interest is the 2nd sentence which tells us where this number comes from: 'max memory' - 'total logical memory'.  These two values can be obtained from running sp_configure or sp_monitorconfig. [NOTE: Keep in mind these two values have a unit of measurement of 2K.]

3. For a breakdown of heap memory usage by connection you may find what you want in monProcessActivity (search for column names that include the string 'heap').  You could compare the sum() of these records with the heap memory related entries in monMemoryUsage (eg, MemoryPoolName = 'Pss Heap Memory' + the appropriate counters/columns).

-------------------

Generally speaking re: querying the MDA tables for specific sets of data ...

Consider downloading the Reference Manual: Tables (PDF) then use your favorite PDF reader to run searches on strings of interest (eg, 'heap').

If/When in doubt about some of your MDA table queries ... consider cross referencing said query results with the config values reported by sp_configure and/or sp_monitorconfig.

entry.content: Perhaps the machine is missing the connectivity driver or has a mismatched driver (e.g. 64-bit when your app is 32-bit).

entry.title: Re: SAPMHTPP Logon failed (reason=1, type=H, method=P )
entry.content: Up -- Still experiencing this issue

entry.title: Re: Fixing vehicle resource in the transportation lane
entry.content:
Hi,

This is a common requirement across the industry in logistics and it can be achieved in the following way:

1. Using Business Rules - Create an incompatibility between the FU and Vehicle Resource. You can data crawl to read the source and destination of the freight unit and use that to define the restriction for that OD pair with any other vehicle resource other than the one you desire. This method does not impact your transportation network and would enable business to maintain this easily.

Hope it helps!

entry.title: Request to create an API key to accommodate with readonly access to Dynatrace API logs data
entry.content:
Hi Team,

The team requested us create an API key to accommodate with readonly access to Dynatrace API logs data


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Request to create an API key to accommodate with read...
entry.content:
Hello team,

To proceed with the API key creation in Dynatrace, please check the following SAP KBA:
3472436 - How to generate personal access token in Dynatrace - SAP Commerce Cloud

After that, you will be able to continue with your project.

entry.title: Re: Combine Multiple Freight orders, which belong to one...
entry.content:
This is a existing white space based on how shippers work with carriers and how the system can react. Best practices encourage you to create a manifest freight order out of direct shipment options for parcel and integrate with EWM. Each stage of the freight order will have packages assigned for that customer (star shaped schema freight order). 

Option 1: Plan a single FO representing the Trailer

Option 2: Usage of Consignment Object by Upgrading to S4-2020/FPS2

Option 3: Multiple FO’s and One TU 

1. Custom development in LDAP message + Review the below BADI’s
2. BADI: /SCWM/EX_SR_NUM, /SCWM/EX_SR_BIF_TAPP_NOTI and /SCWM/EX_SR_BIF_VAPP_NOTI To influence TU/Vehicle creation.
3. BADI: /SCWM/EX_SR_TUDLV_AUTOPLAN -> To influence delivery assignment to TU.

Cons:
1. Very complex development.
2. One TU/Vehicle is linked with one FO in EWM, it might require to table level update to link to multiple FO.
3. Handling Exception scenario like unassign delivery, Reverse PGI etc would add more complexity.
4. While receiving back the updates from EWM to TM, X number of LDAP needs to be triggered in TM so as to update the respective FO’s
5. Representing multiple FO’s for the same physical truck operating at the same time is not the recommended approach in TM.

* Cross Delivery HU, Delivery split, STO’s scenario’s are not considered.

 

Hope this helps!

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – Understanding SAP Business Roles
entry.content:
On that topic, of GUI vs Fiori authorizations, to me the Business Roles should define what Catalogs and Tiles a user can see. But within a tile (ie. a Fiori app), what data a user can see should depend on the backend security authorizations (ie. by company code, etc).

So we're not talking about splitting roles by UI technology, we're just keeping the data authorizations in the backend, and access to catalogs/spaces/tiles in the front-end roles.

That way the front-end roles (eg. ZSD_SP_INTERNAL_SALES a copy of SAP's  SAP_SD_SP_INTERNAL_SALES) can stay generic and be assigned to all Sales Managers from all company codes.

If you combine them into one role, then you will need to repeat the same catalogs/spaces/tiles for each of the company code users, because you have to create a separate role to define the security authorizations, won't you?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP B1: how to link a Sales order and an AR down paym...
entry.content: Hello, is this for SAP Business One or SAP ERP?

entry.title: Re: Access virtual tables (HANA Smart Data Access) in my...
entry.content: Thank you very much for your response, Robert Waywell. You have given me a lot of guidance in solving my scenario.

entry.title: How to ignore specific transport from Downgrade Protection detection
entry.content:
Problem

In Focused Build (FB) or in Change Request Management (ChaRM),we typically have automatic jobs running for doing import in target systems. Many times some of the transports in queue gets failed to import and they the job attempts to import such transports at every execution. While doing so, we may get downgrade protection conflict against any latest transport which is successfully imported. In case of such conflict, the automatic job does not import other transports, blocking complete import. The failed transport may not be resolved immediately, so I needed to find way to let the imports continue, while the failed transport is still there.

Solution

Find which are the transport in conflict. This is either found on Downgrade Protection tabs on CRMUI of Change Document/Release or on FB Batch Import logs. In my example, following were the transport:

Source Transport = D31K905155 (transport being imported, which ended previously with RC=08), Conflict Transport = D31K904807 (Transport with Successful import)

I will have to remove tracking for D31K904807 using report RSCTS_OBJ_TRACK_REMOVE. Here, we give the System ID for target system. Before executing this report, you may check entries in table SCTS_TRACK_MAIN, with REQUEST_ID and SYSTEM_NAME. You should find that few entries exist.

After report is executed, we get success message. If you check the table SCTS_TRACK_MAIN again now, you will find 0 entries with previous criteria.

Summary

  • This solution should be used with care. Means, we should be sure that this has no other downgrade impact. In my case, the Source Transport was only failing at activation phase, Import phase was successful. And, Conflict transport was completely imported. Also, there were no other older pending transports.
  • Report RSCTS_OBJ_TRACK_REMOVE does not ask for any confirmation before executing, so one should be careful about correct input.
  • Ignoring Downgrade Protection conflict on tabs of CRMUI, is also the solution in such cases, but when failed transports still exist, conflicts gets raised again.
  • We could use this solution even in cases, where some transports are removed from buffer without importing them. (Although this is not good practise)

SAP Solution Manager Focused Build for SAP Solution Manager

entry.title: Re: Access virtual tables (HANA Smart Data Access) in my...
entry.content: Thank you very much also for your response, Willem_Pardaens. You have given me guidance on the steps to follow.

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors – Scrambling Framework via Integration Center
entry.content: Nice and very helpful blog. Thank you for sharing this great info.

entry.title: Re: How can we open IQ 16.1 under SUSE 15 with O_DIRECT f...
entry.content: A simplex vs multiplex configuration doesn't change how IQ accesses data on disk. Are you running into a particular issue?

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA for Product Compliance: Deep concern rega...
entry.content:
Hello Paulo

from my point of view: you expect to much by using on Prem  2023 S/4 HAna Product Compliance version...

Regarding:

Now I'm confused and deeply concerned as without the option of updating compliance requirements, the solution is basically worthless? 

1.) as you have statet.. with this version of software you will get updates of "content" (refer to your list); this is the positive piece/story

2.) but according to best knowledge on my side: the software is currently not able to handle the "Requirement" update part; this will come... i am pretty sure

3.) as a consequence: Option 1: check deep the roadmap of Product Compliance and try to understand: at which point of time you will get the missing functionality; Option 2: get in touch with SAP direct to get insight in the roadmap (this option is the best you can do now; this would be my preferred option); option 3: check if the missing functionality will be delivered (somehow) with "cloud" version in the next months; this will not help you as you use "on premise"... but whatever is delivered in the next weeks/months via Cloud Version will come with very high probability with on prem version 2025.

Assumption on my side: the missing functionality will NOT come in the next days/weeks by a "Feature pack" for "on prem" version 2023.

Wish you the best

C.B.

PS: regarding

This is an especially critical feature regarding OnPrem installations, which only upgrade every two years, risking serious threats to business due to lagging contents.

You will get with 2023 on prem: update of "phrases" and "list content" and "graphics" (at any point in time whih you wish (if update is needed) according to my understanding of on prem 2023 capabilities; if you consider in the word "content": the requirement topic: this you will not get..

entry.title: Any BADI on MIGO GR?
entry.content:
Hello,
Our Incoming MIRO Invoice is blocking for Payment because of the No GR, well, so once user posted GR in MIGO the Qty. block (RSEG-SPGRM) got removing, fine, but we want to do some custom coding before / immediately after SAP removes the the Qty. block on MIRO invoice, pls. let us know any BADI / ENH or exit wherein we can put our Z code just before/after the qty. block got removal logic

Thx

entry.title: Re: Fast track your SAP IBP Real time integration journey
entry.content: Hi DG, no this is a different technology called SAP IBP Real Time Integration. It is a purpose built, event based integration for SAP ECC (EHP4-EHp8) and S/4HANA systems.

entry.title: Accrual movement type on gl accounts
entry.content:
Dear all,

Prerequisites:

- Our customer is in the the construction industry running building projects. 

- my customer would like to manually post accruals using movement types to create a accrual history sheet.

Where can I find accrual movement types and can I make them a mandatory field on the gl account?

kind regards

entry.title: Re: Update Property tree CG02 specification using BAPI_BU...
entry.content:
Hello 

please do a search before you ask a question... the topic is discussed very often.

My be this blog might help (BUT OUTDATED)

https://community.sap.com/t5/product-lifecycle-management-blogs-by-members/use-of-bapi-s-in-ehs-classic/ba-p/13399041

Mark has provided the most important hint; 

Wish you the best

C.B.

entry.title: Help with NoClassDefFoundError for com/sap/aii/security/lib/exception/SecurityException in EJB Proj
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am encountering a NoClassDefFoundError for com/sap/aii/security/lib/exception/SecurityException in my EJB project deployed on SAP NetWeaver. Here are the details of my setup and the issue:

Project Setup:

  • I have an EAR project that includes an EJB module and a Dynamic Web Project (DWP).
  • I am using Eclipse for development and SAP PO (Process Orchestration) for deployment.

Issue: When my EJB bean executes the line following line
SAPSecurityResources secRes = SAPSecurityResources.getInstance();
I get the error NoClassDefFoundError: com/sap/aii/security/lib/exception/SecurityException

Here's the full stack trace for the error:

 

javax.ejb.EJBException: nested exception is: java.lang.RuntimeException: java.lang.NoClassDefFoundError: com/sap/aii/security/lib/exception/SecurityException
java.lang.RuntimeException: java.lang.NoClassDefFoundError: com/sap/aii/security/lib/exception/SecurityException
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.RequestInvocationContext.proceedFinal(RequestInvocationContext.java:99)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.AbstractInvocationContext.proceed(AbstractInvocationContext.java:166)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.Interceptors_StatesTransition.invoke(Interceptors_StatesTransition.java:19)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.AbstractInvocationContext.proceed(AbstractInvocationContext.java:179)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.Interceptors_Resource.invoke(Interceptors_Resource.java:50)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.AbstractInvocationContext.proceed(AbstractInvocationContext.java:179)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.Interceptors_Transaction.doWorkWithAttribute(Interceptors_Transaction.java:37)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.Interceptors_Transaction.invoke(Interceptors_Transaction.java:21)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.AbstractInvocationContext.proceed(AbstractInvocationContext.java:179)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.Interceptors_MethodRetry.invoke(Interceptors_MethodRetry.java:46)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.AbstractInvocationContext.proceed(AbstractInvocationContext.java:179)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.AbstractInvocationContext.proceed(AbstractInvocationContext.java:191)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.Interceptors_StatelessInstanceGetter.invoke(Interceptors_StatelessInstanceGetter.java:23)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.AbstractInvocationContext.proceed(AbstractInvocationContext.java:179)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.Interceptors_SecurityCheck.invoke(Interceptors_SecurityCheck.java:25)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.AbstractInvocationContext.proceed(AbstractInvocationContext.java:179)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.Interceptors_ExceptionTracer.invoke(Interceptors_ExceptionTracer.java:17)

at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.DefaultEJBProxyInvocationHandler.invoke(DefaultEJBProxyInvocationHandler.java:99)
at com.sun.proxy.$Proxy3585.loadCertificate(Unknown Source)
at com.myname.mycompany.myclient.servlet.certificates.CertificateRetrieveServlet.doGet(CertificateRetrieveServlet.java:41)
at javax.servlet.http.HttpServlet.service(HttpServlet.java:734)
at javax.servlet.http.HttpServlet.service(HttpServlet.java:847)
at com.sap.engine.services.servlets_jsp.server.Invokable.invoke(Invokable.java:152)

... 63 more

at sun.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke0(Native Method)

------------------------- Loader Info -------------------------
ClassLoader name: [sap.com/myclient2partyLdap-ear-jp-library-loader]
Loader hash code: 75994782
Living status: alive
Direct parent loaders:
[system:Frame]

[library:j2eeca]
[library:activation_api_ri]

[library:saaj13_api]
[library:jaxb20_api]
[library:jaxws_api]
[library:jws_api]
[library:ec~java~jsf~api]
[library:tc~je~deployment14_api]
[library:jms_api]
[library:tc~je~jacc~plb]
[library:ejb_api]
[library:tc~je~javax77]
[library:jaxr_api]
Resources:
/usr/sap/PO1/J00/j2ee/cluster/apps/sap.com/myclient2partyLdap-ear-jp/app_libraries_container/lib/com.sap.aii.af.svc.filter.jar
/usr/sap/PO1/J00/j2ee/cluster/apps/sap.com/myclient2partyLdap-ear-jp/app_libraries_container/lib/com.sap.aii.af.svc.facade.jar
/usr/sap/PO1/J00/j2ee/cluster/apps/sap.com/myclient2partyLdap-ear-jp/app_libraries_container/lib/com.sap.aii.af.cpa.svc.filter.jar
/usr/sap/PO1/J00/j2ee/cluster/apps/sap.com/myclient2partyLdap-ear-jp/app_libraries_container/lib/com.sap.security_2.0.0.201214143317.jar
---------------------------------------------------------------
at com.sap.engine.boot.loader.MultiParentClassLoader.loadClass(MultiParentClassLoader.java:280)
at com.sap.engine.boot.loader.MultiParentClassLoader.loadClass(MultiParentClassLoader.java:249)
... 69 more

According to help.sap.com/PI/com/sap/aii/af/service/resource/SAPSecurityResources documentation, only com.sap.aii.af.svc.facade jar file is needed to make an instance of SAPSecurityResources object if you want to access KeyStoreManager and manage certificates, but somehow my code doesn't run.

Steps Taken:
  1. I have added the necessary JAR files to the EAR project's lib directory.
  2. I have ensured these JAR files are included in the EAR deployment assembly.

I have also added these JAR files to the EJB and Dynamic Web Projects' build paths in Eclipse.

Any help would be greatly appreciated. 


other Questions:asdad

  1. Is it sufficient to add the required JARs only to the EAR lib directory, or do they need to be explicitly referenced in the EJB and DWP projects' deployment assembly?

P.S I have accessed keystore views in java mappings using the exact same api but in the setup mentioned above I get the NoClassDefFoundError.

Thanks
Syed Ijlal Ayub

entry.title: SAP Developer News, May 23rd, 2024
entry.content:
Mastering SAP Collaborate

  • Event Site: https://reg.eventmobi.com/mastering-sap-melbourne-2024

Extension Architecture Guide:

  • Extension Architecture Guide: https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-btp-guidance-framework/extension-architecture-guide/what-is-extension-architecture-guide
  • SAP Application Extension Methodology: https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-btp-guidance-framework/sap-application-extension-methodology/sap-application-extension-methodology-overview?locale=en-US

SAP BTP ABAP Environment – Release 2405

  • Blog post: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-btp-abap-environment-release-2405/ba-p/13705247
  • Official Release Notes Page : https://help.sap.com/whats-new/7a822d3bcaa74f31b98fa315601e9c96?Version=ABAP%20Environment%202405&locale=en-US

 

Edge Integration Cell on K3S:

  • Deploying SAP Edge Integration Cell Playground: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/deploying-sap-edge-integration-cell-playground/ba-p/13705377
  • SAP Tech Bytes – EIC playlist: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PHPPnma7Y1A&list=PL6RpkC85SLQAy8g4peerZFjOu9Hxf4TyZ

New Features for SAP Fiori elements for OData V4

  • Blog post: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/unlocking-efficiency-and-simplicity-a-look-into-the-new-features-of-sap/ba-p/13645297
  • Release notes: https://help.sap.com/whats-new/67f60363b57f4ac0b23efd17fa192d60?Category=SAP%20Fiori%20Elements&locale=en-US&Version=1.121

================================================================================

CHAPTER TITLES

0:00 Intro

0:08 Mastering SAP Collaborate

1:19 DYK – CAP Plugins

2:08 Extension Architecture Guide

3:05 SAP BTP ABAP Environment – Release 2405

4:25 Edge Integration Cell on K3S

5:25 New Features for SAP Fiori elements for OData V4

entry.title: Re: Invalid datetime value when using Python Script in Datasphere
entry.content: Hi Markus. From what I can read it fails at the filed which Python transformation (using Pandas package) assumes should be a valid date-time. Instead it seems to receive some date from Jan 1st, Year 1.

Laurent

Thanks so much

Fernando.

entry.title: Re: Future of Electronic Bank Statement Processing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud - Deprecation of 4X8
entry.content:
Hi Victor_Alvarez,

 

thanks for your feedback. I got some questions back to you:

 

1. Could you give a clear example which item you have and what kind of information is entered where. I would like to understand the requirement and if it is really not solvable using REGEX.

 

2. So the feature you are missing is: take the VAT ID and derive which customer/supplier is involved and propagate or enhance the bank statement item with that information, right? Sounds like a valid feature request to me, I would agree.

 

3. Well here, just as in the first point, I would need a clear example, so that we could look at the requirement and how valid that scenario is to now offer that kind of flexibility in cloud. 

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Financials Development

entry.title: networkgraph.Graph Swim Lanes Order
entry.content:
Good morning, I'm trying to create a Graph to display a process flow from start to end using SwimLaneChainLayout

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/entity/sap.suite.ui.commons.networkgraph.Graph/sample/sap.suite.ui.commons.sample.NetworkGraphSwimLane

Nodes, Lines and Groups display well but group order is not according to the data

Is there a way to force the Lanes order?

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP Error - invalid table name: Could not find ta...
entry.content:
Here is the checklist I use: 

1. Let's say I have a remote table that I have in a regular database schema and that TABLE is called SAP_AUFK

2. Make sure the Synonym is there and working. -> It sounds like you have checked that already"C_SAP_AUFK": { "target": { "object": "SAP_AUFK", "schema": "CLEVER" } }3. You create a .cds file that represents that synonym. a) If you have underscores in the name, you can model them as context or namespace. b) add cds.persistence.exists in front of the entitycontext c { @CDS.persistence.exists entity SAP_AUFK { key MANDT : String(3); key AUFNR : String(12); AUART : String(4); ... }; }4. Now you can treat them as a regular entity. Gut feeling and without seeing more of your code, I think you have not configured the representative entity correctly.

entry.title: Re: Error "Missing JWT Token for forwardAuthToken" When U...
entry.content: What are you uploading to? From a client to CAP or CAP to a backend system like SAP?

entry.title: I'm new to Sap Community

Can you recommend any good learning materials or tutorials?

Thanks,

entry.title: Integration Suite with HA and DR scenarios
entry.content:
Sometimes we forget integrations when we analyze availability requirements. A case I found many times is two business-critical solutions with all mechanisms to keep them up and running 7x24. But the middleware to integrate them is a stand-alone instance. So, in case the middleware fails the business-critical solutions are impacted.

So, when you are going to design the architecture, you need to take into account the availability requirements of your middleware solution. In this article, I tell how to implement high availability and Disaster Recovery in the Integration Suite.

High Availability

This is easy. SAP Integration Suite provides high availability by default based on multi-availability zone redundancy

How? SAP Business Technology Platform provides a Service URL to connect to the “active” Integration Suite tenant. In case of failure on the availability zone of the “active” Integration Suite tenant, the failover route is activated to another availability zone with a “stand-by” Integration Suite tenant.

It allows SAP to grant 99,7% of SLA (check SAP Service Level Agreements for cloud services in SAP Trust Center). Around 2 per month maximum!

Disaster Recovery

In those scenarios where the business processes are so critical that 99,7% of SLA is insufficient, you need to implement a Disaster Recovery.

A Disaster Recovery architecture has additional costs because you need to replicate the Integration Suite in 2 regions (or more, depending on your requirements). It means you need,

  1. To activate a SAP Integration Suite tenant in all those regions
  2. To implement a Load Balancer to provide a failover route

Consider the governance too.

When you work in a high-availability scenario, Integration Suite manages internally the replication into the availability zones. If you deploy an iFlow or an API on SAP Integration Suite, it will be available on all the availability zones, so the failover is transparent.

But if you work in a disaster recovery scenario, the replication of iFlows, APIs, etc. is not done by SAP automatically. You need to manage this and keep all Integration Suite instances aligned. This is an extra effort in maintenance, but critical: in case of failover, if the Integration Suite instances are not aligned the integrations may fail.

High availability and Disaster Recovery with Edge Integration Cell

Edge Integration Cell is the SAP Integration Suite extension on-premises or IaaS for ground-to-ground integrations.

It runs on Kubernetes, so to implement high-availability or disaster recovery architectures we can find 2 scenarios:

 

  1. Kubernetes on-premises: Three worker nodes are required to provide high-availability
  2. Kubernetes as a platform: Offers several resiliency features. Multiple availability zones are provided for Kubernetes deployments. For a high availability setup with a minimum of three worker nodes, you require 3 availability zones

In case disaster recovery is mandatory, for both scenarios the option is to have 2 Kubernetes with,

  1. An additional Edge Integration Cell instance on the same SAP Integration Suite tenant. Integration Suite Standard and Premium editions come with only one Edge Integration Cell instance, but you can get additional instances
  2. A Load Balancer to provide a failover route

Installation prerequisites for SAP Edge Integration Cell are in SAP note 3247839. High availability requirements for Edge Integration Cell are at the SAP Help Portal for Integration Suite.

But do not forget the productive implementation requires PostgreSQL and Redis Data Store out of Kubernetes. High availability and disaster recovery for these services must have dedicated solutions. Only if you use cloud platform offerings like Azure Database for PostgreSQL, or Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL you have high availability requirements fulfilled.

Conclusions

If the solutions you want to integrate have a 99,7% or lower SLA, or if you do not need a higher availability because this SLA level is high enough for supported business processes, even when the solutions provide a higher SLA, use Integration Suite or Edge Integration cell with no extra availability mechanisms.

Otherwise, implement disaster recovery mechanisms. The business impact cost is worse than implementing the disaster recovery for sure!

Finally, always check the latest information in the SAP Help Portal and the most recent notes.

there are quite a lot of BAPIs you could use, please have a look yourself into 

BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE

or the BAdI: MB_MIGO_BADI 

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Financials Development

entry.title: SAP B1 Resources Posting Ex.Rate in Production Process
entry.content:
1. In SAP Business One 9.3 PL10 on SQL
  2. Having item with BoM > in this BoM having items and resources
  3. Posting Production Order for example with DocDate: 01-04-2023
  4. Posting Goods Issue for production with the same date: 01-04-2023
  5. The Goods Issue for Production has been posted on 09-04-2023
  6. The generated JE from the Goods Issue is posting the totals correctly for the local currency, but when it comes to the system currency totals:
  7. It posts the items with the ex.rate on the Goods Issue Document Date
  8. Where it posts the resources system currency total with the ex.rate on the Posting Date of the Goods Issue Document Date

Why for the same Goods Issue document SAP posts resources on the posting date ex.rate where posting the items total for the same document on the DocDate instead of the Posting Date?

SAP Business OneMicrosoft SQL Server
